positive: A vibrant, minimalist stylized illustration of a crescent moon cradling a cluster of stylized, geometric bioluminescent leaves and stars. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, creating a clean silhouette against a deep midnight blue backdrop. Use high contrast with luminous teal, gold leaf accents, and deep indigo. The style should be a modern, elegant linework etching combined with ethereal, glowing watercolor textures. Perfect for a sophisticated apparel print, ensuring all details are crisp and vector-like. Flat composition, strong edges, ethereal glow, bioluminescence, stylized botanical elements.
